title: Abdominal pain

items.final_wording: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.

items.rationale: Defines the exact adult Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.

items.final_wording: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped pain characteristics and associated gastrointestinal, urinary, and systemic history domains.

items.final_wording: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped severe-pain, bleeding, dysphagia, weight-loss, fever, vomiting, and shock-related prompts.

items.final_wording: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped clinician-selected blood, urine, pregnancy, pancreatic-enzyme, and imaging documentation.

items.final_wording: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.

items.rationale: Reviewed to verify specialist and emergency escalation features; no autonomous referral instruction was mapped.
